eq_h_total.plain: Total Hamiltonian splits into static + drive terms.

eq_h_drive_density.plain: Drive couples to onsite electron number operators.

eq_drive_waveform.plain: Gaussian-envelope sinusoidal drive with spatial weights s_i.

eq_number_operator.plain: JW number-operator identity used for occupancy observables.

eq_energy_static.plain: Static-Hamiltonian energy channel for branch b.

eq_subspace_fidelity.plain: Projected fidelity against sector-filtered exact GS manifold.

eq_slope_switch.plain: Windowed abs-slope plateau rule for stage transitions.

eq_noisy_estimator.plain: Noisy oracle aggregate, empirical spread, and standard error over repeats.

eq_noisy_delta.plain: Noisy-vs-ideal observable delta with propagated standard error.

eq_proxy_cost.plain: Per-term hardware proxy definitions for dynamics benchmark totals.

eq_runtime_bench.plain: Runtime decomposition for noisy dynamics evaluation.
